_note: SAMPLE / DEMO DATA — for prototype only. State benefit examples are illustrative placeholders and MUST be verified with each state's Department of Veterans Affairs. VetPath does not guarantee state eligibility.
genericPlaceholder: Sample placeholder: Most states offer some mix of property-tax relief, tuition or education support, license/park discounts, and employment preference for veterans. Contact your state Department of Veterans Affairs and county veteran service officer to confirm what applies to you.

states.name: California
samplePrograms: Sample: CalVet Home Loan program for eligible veterans.
Sample: property-tax exemptions for qualifying disabled veterans.
Sample: college fee waivers for eligible dependents.

states.name: Florida
samplePrograms: Sample: homestead property-tax exemptions for disabled veterans.
Sample: no state income tax (applies to retirement pay).
Sample: education and tuition programs for veterans and dependents.

states.name: New York
samplePrograms: Sample: property-tax exemptions for veterans (alternative/eligible funds).
Sample: state education awards for veterans and dependents.
Sample: civil-service veteran hiring preference points.
states.agency: New York State Department of Veterans' Services

states.name: Texas
samplePrograms: Sample: Hazlewood Act tuition benefit for veterans and eligible dependents.
Sample: property-tax exemptions scaled to disability rating.
Sample: Texas Veterans Land Board home and land loan programs.

states.name: Virginia
samplePrograms: Sample: Virginia Military Survivors and Dependents Education Program.
Sample: property-tax exemption for 100% service-connected disabled veterans.
Sample: Virginia Values Veterans (V3) employer hiring program.
